channel.title: GitHub HLSL Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of HLSL in GitHub

item.title: DuoStream/Duo
item.description: An HDR-compatible multiseat streaming solution based around RdpWrap, Sunshine, Moonlight, and a variety of custom driver and library patches

item.title: JamesCJ60/Universal-x86-Tuning-Utility
item.description: Unlock the full potential of your Intel/AMD based device.
